name: Sukkot
traditions: Building and dwelling in temporary shelters (sukkah); waving the Four Species (lulav and etrog); festive meals; Hoshanah Rabbah processions.
historicalBackground: Sukkot commemorates the 40 years of Israelite wandering in the desert, living in temporary shelters. It is also a harvest thanksgiving festival.
description: The Jewish Feast of Tabernacles, a week of dwelling in decorated outdoor huts and celebrating the autumn harvest.
